description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsBlush coloured brassiere, has moulded, underwired and padded cups in polyamide fabric, medium coverage, detachable straps, adjustable single hook and eye closure at the back and a smooth look to be worn under tight fitting clothesMaterial and Care91% nylon and 9% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
